title: Mind Map Diagram Schema
description: Intermediate representation for mind map diagrams. LLM extracts hierarchical structure from natural language into this format, then rendering pipeline generates HTML/SVG from it.

diagramType.description: Identifies this JSON as a mind map diagram. Must be 'mindmap'.

title.description: Diagram title, displayed as h1 at the top of the page.

subtitle.description: Optional subtitle shown below the title.

style.description: Visual style preset. Each style has its own template and design rules. Options: dark-professional (dark tech), hand-drawn (sketch/whiteboard), light-corporate (business/clean), cyberpunk-neon (neon glow/Catppuccin), blueprint (engineering/Nord), warm-cozy (friendly/Gruvbox), minimalist (ultra-clean monochrome), terminal-retro (CRT green-on-black), pastel-dream (soft pastels, rounded), notion (Notion-like document aesthetic), material (Google Material Design), glassmorphism (frosted glass/translucent).

format.description: Output format. HTML is the default (single-file with inline SVG and CSS). SVG outputs standalone SVG. Mermaid outputs Mermaid text syntax.

density.description: Layout density. compact=tighter spacing for dense diagrams; normal=standard spacing; spacious=generous spacing for presentations.

centralNode.description: The root node of the mind map, placed at the center of the diagram.

legend.description: Legend entries shown below the diagram. Auto-generated from branch colors if not provided.

font.description: Optional font override. Replaces the style's default font family. Use a Google Fonts name (e.g., 'Inter', 'Fira Code', 'Merriweather').

colors.description: Optional color overrides. Each key overrides the corresponding semantic color from the chosen style.

metadata.description: Optional metadata for the generated page.

centralNode.description: The central (root) node of the mind map. Rendered as a prominent circle or rounded rectangle at the center of the SVG.

id.description: Unique identifier for the central node.

label.description: Display text for the central node.

color.description: Hex color override for the central node. If omitted, uses the accent color from the chosen style.

icon.description: Optional icon identifier from the icons catalog. Rendered next to the central node label.

children.description: Top-level branches radiating from the central node. Each branch can recursively contain sub-branches. Practical depth limit: 4 levels.

branch.description: A branch (sub-node) in the mind map. Can recursively contain child branches. Practical depth limit: 4 levels total from centralNode.

id.description: Unique identifier across the entire diagram.

side.description: Which side of the central node this branch is rendered on. 'auto' means balanced distribution (algorithm splits children evenly between left and right). Only meaningful for top-level branches (children of centralNode); deeper branches inherit their parent's side.

color.description: Hex color override for this branch and its descendants. If omitted, auto-assigned from the design palette. Top-level branches get distinct hues; children inherit lighter shades.

icon.description: Optional icon identifier from the icons catalog.

children.description: Sub-branches of this branch. Recursive structure. Each child inherits side from its parent.

color.description: Hex color for the legend swatch. Auto-derived from branch color if omitted.
